packageRules.description: Never update requires-python; Python version is managed manually.

Don't gate one-time pin/pinDigest operations on minimumReleaseAge. The value being pinned is what's currently in use, so the 7-day window adds no safety here. Without this, grouped pin PRs can get stuck pending forever because at least one dependency in the group typically has a release within the last 7 days.

Group all non-major Python (PEP 621) updates into one PR and automerge. rangeStrategy=pin ensures uv installs the exact version Renovate chose, preventing resolver drift that would bypass minimumReleaseAge.
Group all Python (PEP 621) major updates into one PR — no automerge.
Group all non-major Docker image updates into one PR and automerge. Excludes the uv base image which is pinned via python-runtime.
Group all Docker major updates into one PR — no automerge.
Group all non-major GitHub Actions updates into one PR and automerge.
Group all GitHub Actions major updates into one PR — no automerge.
Group Python runtime version together: .python-version and the uv Docker base image must stay in sync.
Align uv Docker base tags with project.requires-python in pyproject.toml (currently <3.14). Update this regex when changing the upper bound.

Hugging Face transformers v5: blocked by optimum-onnx (transitive via sentence-transformers[onnx]) which caps transformers<4.58.0. Since 4.58.0 was never released (HF jumped to 5.0.0), this blocks all of v5. Tracking issue: https://github.com/huggingface/optimum-onnx/issues/114. When resolved, remove this rule and the <5.0.0 bound in pyproject.toml.
